content_of_post_to_comment: Today was the day I had the realization that I am addicted to YouTube shorts. I always thought that I am better than my peers since I have never used TikTok, instagram, or any other form of social media besides YouTube. However, I realized that I mindlessly watch YouTube shorts for hours on end. Out of curiosity I checked my screen time, and found that I spent 50 hours on YouTube last week, 90% of which was probably spent on shorts. The thing is that I don't watch YouTube on my phone, rather on my computer which I need to use to do productive things so putting my phone away won't help. What should my next steps be to cut YouTube out of my life?
comment: Spending 50h on YouTube mostly Shorts is exactly how that feed is designed to pull you in, especially on a desktop where you feel 'productive'. I'd try nuking the recommendation loop: turn off watch history, use subscriptions only, and add a blocker for /shorts. Even small friction helps break the autopilot.
